name: Vaud (Switzerland)
description: A square flag of two horizontal bands, white over green, with the gold motto 'LIBERTÉ ET PATRIE' on the white band.
history: Based on the green flag of the 1790s Vaudois insurrection against Bernese rule; the gold lettering was added with the cantonal army in 1819, famously breaking the heraldic rule against placing gold on silver (white).

features.role: the motto 'LIBERTÉ ET PATRIE' in gold on the white band
